payload.title: Persistent ticket ordering
payload.description:
User-defined ordering of tickets within board columns, persisted to the DB and synced across clients. Drag a card up/down within a column and the position sticks — in the flat list, epic swimlanes, and priority swimlanes alike.

Design (decided):
- ONE rank per ticket (global). Every view sorts by it; reordering in any view updates that single value. Order stays consistent everywhere.
- rank is a REAL/float. Insert between neighbors via fractional midpoint (between 1.0 and 2.0 -> 1.5), so one drag = ONE ticket.set_field event on ONE ticket. No column-wide renumber, clean under field-level last-writer-wins.
- Sort rank ASC, number ASC. Backfill rank=number so default order matches today exactly.
- Rides the existing PATCH -> ticket.set_field -> gossip/SSE sync path. No new event kind.
